Table 7: Threat model and mitigations for the memory privacy boundary.

Figure 1: Kumiho dashboard showing the AI Cognitive Memory browser. The selected node (kumiho.io dashboard Memory page redesign with graph visualization) displays its summary, kref URI, revision tag (r=1, latest), and creation date. The forcedirected graph on the right visualizes typed edges to related memories. Stats cards show total memories (19), spaces (9), connections for the selected memory (3), and Dream State recency (4 days ago). The same graph, SDK, and API that agents use to manage work products is exposed here for human inspection.
